entities.name: GERMPLASM COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Vast collections of genetic resources accessible for crop improvement

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of crops for better yield or quality

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify locations on a chromosome and clarify the structure of genetic diversity

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME SURVEYS
entities.description: Comprehensive analysis of the entire genome to study population dynamics and selection

entities.name: GENE-TARGETED SURVEYS
entities.description: Analysis focusing on specific genes to study population dynamics and selection

entities.name: POPULATION DYNAMICS
entities.description: The study of how and why populations change over time

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process by which certain traits become more common in a population

entities.name: DOMESTICATION
entities.description: The process of adapting wild plants for human use

entities.name: GERMPLASM DESCRIPTION
entities.description: The process of characterizing genetic resources to resolve the genetic basis of traits

entities.name: TRAIT VARIATION
entities.description: Differences in characteristics among individuals of a crop

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process by which a species becomes better suited to its environment

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Major cereal crops used in germplasm description

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in germplasm description

entities.name: GRAPEVINE
entities.description: A woody vine crop used in germplasm description

entities.name: CACAO
entities.description: A tree crop used in germplasm description

entities.name: BANANA
entities.description: A tropical fruit crop used in germplasm description

entities.name: PLANT BEHAVIOR
entities.description: The response of a plant to its environment and genetic makeup

entities.name: CORE REFERENCE SETS
entities.description: A representative subset of a larger germplasm collection to facilitate material sharing
